paper_title: Experimental Methods in Maize Male Reproductive Development

methods.description: RNA-seq was performed on four tissues representing integral stages in maize male gametophyte development to analyze gene expression patterns.

steps.description: RNA was extracted from the inbred maize line B73, with four biological replicates for each tissue.
steps.searchable_summary: extract RNA from maize line B73 for four tissue types

steps.description: Libraries were sequenced using Illumina sequencing (100 bp paired-end reads) and mapped to the B73 AGPv4 reference genome.
steps.searchable_summary: sequence RNA libraries using Illumina and map to B73 AGPv4 genome

steps.description: Principal Component Analysis (PCA) showed samples from each tissue clustering together along PC1 and PC2.
steps.searchable_summary: perform PCA on sequencing data to analyze sample clustering

steps.description: Differential gene expression was defined by comparing gene expression in later developmental stages to the premeiotic, diploid tassel primordia and between all adjacent developmental stages.
steps.searchable_summary: calculate differential gene expression between developmental stages

steps.description: Enriched GO terms highlighted the differences in gene expression among developmental stages.
steps.searchable_summary: identify enriched GO terms from differential expression data

methods.method_name: Mapping Reads and Differential Expression Assessment
methods.description: Process of mapping reads to genes, assessing differential expression, and performing GO enrichment analysis.

steps.description: Ribosomal reads (rRNA) were removed from all samples using STAR.
rRNA-filtered sequences were mapped to the maize reference genome using STAR, keeping only unique alignments.
steps.searchable_summary: map filtered sequences to maize genome with STAR

steps.description: Transcript levels of annotated gene isoforms were measured using Cufflinks.
Differential expression was calculated between each tissue with Cuffdiff.
GO term enrichment was calculated using the singular enrichment analysis method with a Fisher test.

methods.description: Analysis of transposable elements (TEs) using differential expression analysis and categorization based on expression patterns.

steps.description: FeatureCount file was used as input for differential expression analysis using DESeq2.
steps.searchable_summary: use featureCount file for DESeq2 analysis

steps.description: Normalized read counts for all TEs were obtained and filtered based on distance from genes.
steps.searchable_summary: filter TEs based on distance from genes

steps.description: Pairwise volcano plots were generated for all samples against the reference seedling tissue.
steps.searchable_summary: generate volcano plots for TE expression

steps.description: TEs were categorized as 'dynamic' or 'static' based on statistical significance of expression changes.
steps.searchable_summary: categorize TEs based on expression changes

methods.method_name: Zm gex2 Sequence Analysis and Phenotype Characterization
methods.description: Analysis of Zm gex2 sequence and characterization of phenotypes related to seed size and seedless area.

steps.description: Protein sequence encoded by Zm gex2 was retrieved from the Maize Genetics and Genomics Database.
steps.searchable_summary: retrieve Zm gex2 protein sequence from MaizeGDB

steps.description: Maize and Arabidopsis GEX2 protein domains were predicted by InterPro.
To quantify small seed phenotype, mature, dried down maize ears were imaged prior to seed removal.
steps.searchable_summary: image maize ears to quantify small seed phenotype

steps.description: Seedless area was quantified as a percentage of total area using ImageJ.
For analysis of embryo sacs by confocal microscopy, tissues were stained and visualized on a Leica SP8 microscope.
steps.searchable_summary: visualize embryo sacs with confocal microscopy
